allowed_tones.description: Affirms learner growth, agency, and confidence-building.
evidence: "Your English journey is progressing beautifully"
"You're building confidence one conversation at a time"
"Every practice session brings you closer to your goals"
"You've completed 5 lessons this week!"
"Milestone unlocked: 30-day practice streak"
"You're now in the top 10% of learners in your city"

allowed_tones.description: Supports continued practice with positive reinforcement.
evidence: "Let's practice together today"
"Your speaking skills are improving every day"
"Keep up the great momentum"

allowed_tones.description: Uses peers or broader community as positive motivation.
evidence: "3 friends joined SpeakX this week in your area"
"Your colleague Priya is on a 15-day streak"
"Join 50,000+ learners transforming their careers"

allowed_tones.description: Creates urgency without fear or manipulation.
evidence: "Only 2 days left in your trial - continue your journey"
"Unlock premium scenarios before your streak resets"
"Limited spots: Join this weekend's live masterclass"

allowed_tones.description: Frames progress, balance, or pathway as belonging to the learner.
evidence: "Your 50-coin balance is waiting"
"Your personalized learning path is ready"
"Your weekly progress report is here"
"Don't lose your progress!"
"Your career is at risk without English skills"
"You're falling behind"
"You missed practice again"
"Others are ahead of you"
"Your streak is broken - what happened?"
"LAST CHANCE! Subscribe NOW!"
"Your account will be deleted in 24 hours"
"Don't miss out - everyone else is subscribing"
"You're slower than average learners"
"Your friend is better than you"
"Why aren't you practicing like others?"

disallowed_tones.reason: "We'll delete your data if you don't subscribe"
evidence: "We'll delete your data if you don't subscribe"
"Your family will be disappointed"
"Hide this from others - special deal only for you"

hook_taxonomy.hook: "Your practice today contributes to breaking language barriers across India"
hook_taxonomy.description: Social impact, generational change, being part of movement
hook_taxonomy.risk_notes: Use ethically and avoid manipulative framing.
evidence: "Join 50,000+ learners transforming India's English fluency"
"Your practice today contributes to breaking language barriers across India"
Social impact, generational change, being part of movement

hook_taxonomy.hook: "You've mastered 15 business scenarios - expert level unlocked!"
hook_taxonomy.description: Skill mastery, visible progress, competence demonstration
hook_taxonomy.risk_notes: Use ethically and avoid manipulative framing.
evidence: Level progression, badges, certificates
"You've mastered 15 business scenarios - expert level unlocked!"
Skill mastery, visible progress, competence demonstration

hook_taxonomy.hook: "Design your own practice scenario and share with the community"
hook_taxonomy.description: Creative expression, personalized learning, strategy optimization
hook_taxonomy.risk_notes: Use ethically and avoid manipulative framing.
evidence: Free conversation mode, custom roleplay creation
"Design your own practice scenario and share with the community"
Creative expression, personalized learning, strategy optimization

hook_taxonomy.hook: "Your 250 coins can unlock exclusive pronunciation masterclass"
hook_taxonomy.description: Asset accumulation, investment protection, portfolio building
hook_taxonomy.risk_notes: Use ethically and avoid manipulative framing.
evidence: Coin collection, streak ownership, progress portfolio
"Your 250 coins can unlock exclusive pronunciation masterclass"
Asset accumulation, investment protection, portfolio building

hook_taxonomy.hook: "Ravi from your company just completed the same lesson"
hook_taxonomy.description: Peer comparison, social validation, community belonging
hook_taxonomy.risk_notes: Use ethically and avoid manipulative framing.
evidence: Leaderboards, friend challenges, group learning
"Ravi from your company just completed the same lesson"
Peer comparison, social validation, community belonging

hook_taxonomy.hook: "Weekend masterclass: Only 50 spots available for your city"
hook_taxonomy.description: Exclusive access, time-sensitive opportunities, rare achievements
hook_taxonomy.risk_notes: Use ethically and avoid manipulative framing.
evidence: Limited-time challenges, seasonal events, early access
"Weekend masterclass: Only 50 spots available for your city"
Exclusive access, time-sensitive opportunities, rare achievements

hook_taxonomy.hook: "Unlock today's surprise lesson - topic revealed after completion"
hook_taxonomy.risk_notes: Use ethically and avoid manipulative framing.
evidence: Daily surprise challenges, mystery rewards, random pronunciation tips
"Unlock today's surprise lesson - topic revealed after completion"
Discovery, anticipation, varied experiences

hook_taxonomy.hook: "Save your 14-day streak with one quick lesson today"
hook_taxonomy.description: Progress protection, investment preservation, continuity maintenance
hook_taxonomy.risk_notes: Use ethically and avoid manipulative framing.
evidence: Streak save opportunities (positive framing), progress preservation
"Save your 14-day streak with one quick lesson today"
Progress protection, investment preservation, continuity maintenance
